utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 5 items: (1) health_coverage with physical and mental health insurance and costs, (2) property_coverage with home/contents insurance and costs, (3) travel_coverage with travel insurance and costs, (4) additional_services with enhancement services and costs, and (5) total_budget with monthly/annual cost breakdown. The final coverage plan includes all five sections. Each section has the required details: health_coverage lists both physical and mental health insurance names and corresponding costs; property_coverage includes home/contents insurance name, cost, and even a coverage limit; travel_coverage provides insurance name and cost; additional_services include one enhancement service and cost; total_budget includes both monthly and annual breakdowns. Therefore, all 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes four main items: 'Optimized Comprehensive Package9' for both physical and mental health insurance, 'plan_option50' for home contents insurance, 'Premium Family Plan' for travel insurance, and 'Optimized Comprehensive Package7' as an additional service. When checking the ground-truth ratings, none of these names ('Optimized Comprehensive Package9', 'plan_option50', 'Premium Family Plan', 'Optimized Comprehensive Package7') appear in any of the provided categories (primary_health_coverage, property_protection, mobility_coverage, health_enhancement_services, property_enhancement_services, travel_enhancement_services, or general_services). Therefore, there are no matching ratings available for these items.
